Name: Record Generation
Description: Maps a single source record to a target record using field mappings and template expressions. The core mapping card.

SettingsInputs.Name: SourceRecord
SettingsInputs.Description: The source record to transform (wired from Pull Filtered Records.CurrentRecord)

SettingsInputs.Name: MappingConfiguration
SettingsInputs.Description: Field mapping rules: { Entity, Mappings: { Target: "{~D:Record.Source~}" }, GUIDTemplate, Solvers }

StateOutputs.Name: SourceRecord
StateOutputs.Description: Echo of the source record (for downstream reference)
